description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a combination of white and brown wall panels, a large stone-textured accent, and multiple rectangular windows, some with horizontal slats for shade. The entryway is defined by a double gate, a pedestrian gate, and a short set of steps leading to the main door, all enclosed by a low perimeter wall. The side and rear elevations are mostly solid white, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and a sidewalk adjacent to a main road. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on straight lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, geometric lines, and a mix of white, brown, and stone-textured panels. The front features large windows, a double gate, and a low perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double gate, large windows, and decorative wall panels facing the street.
description_view_1: Left side view with a mostly solid white wall, minimal windows, and the driveway extending to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white facade with no visible windows or doors, enclosed by the backyard wall.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the side entrance, balcony, and the continuation of the modern facade elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and horizontal slats
attribute_entryway_design: Double gate with a short set of steps, main door recessed under an overhang, and a low perimeter wall
